name: Moorwraith

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Demise (Earth's Remedy)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, allies within (m)2" of this model heal 1.

abilities.name: Through the Muck
abilities.text: If this model ends its activation within 2" of a piece of terrain or Lamp marker, it heals 1.

actions.name: Rolling Stone
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may deal up to 2 damage to itself.
actions.effects: This action deals +1 damage to the target per damage suffered when declaring this action.

triggers.name: Bowled Over
triggers.text: Move the target 4" away, then move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Grab On
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token. End this model's activation.

actions.name: Dirt Nap
actions.effects: Target heals 1 and gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Sinking Tomb
triggers.text: When resolving, instead of healing, the target is dealt 1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Healing Burst
triggers.text: Models within (pulse)2" of the target heal 2.

extraction_notes: STN: 8 visible on card (likely station value)
